holdings.infoBox: KWEB is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tencent Holdings stock at 10.19%, Alibaba Group Holding at 8.94%, PDD Holdings at 7.48%, Meituan at 7.48%, and NetEase at 7.08%.

overview.description: The KraneShares CSI China Internet ETF (KWEB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CSI Overseas China Internet index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index composed of overseas-listed Chinese Internet companies. KWEB was launched on Jul 31, 2013 and is issued by KraneShares.
